name: Sunken Temple
description: The moss-covered roof of an ancient stone structure juts out from the dark waters of the swamp. It appears to be sinking slowly into the mire.

discovery.message: Through the thick swamp mist, you spot the vine-draped ruins of a large stone building.

approach.text: You must wade through waist-deep, foul-smelling mud to reach the entrance.
approach.success_text: You push through the muck and reach the stone steps of the temple.
approach.failure_text: The mud is thick and exhausting. You eventually reach the temple, but you're worn out.

approach-fail.text: Your muscles ache from the struggle. (Gained 2 Fatigue)

temple-entry.text: The heavy stone doors are ajar. Inside, a main hallway leads deep into the structure, but you notice a narrow, dry crack in the wall to the right.

choices.label: [Perception 16] Examine the crack in the wall.

temple-guardian.text: A pale, flickering light floats in the darkness of the hall. As you approach, it lunges!

secret-passage-find.text: The crack leads to a narrow maintenance tunnel that bypasses the main hall. It seems much safer.

choices.label: Go back and take the main hall anyway.

temple-boss.text: In the main chamber, a massive spider has spun its web across the altar. It drops from the ceiling to defend its lair!

temple-altar.text: Behind the spider's web, the ancient altar holds a few remaining treasures.
